home_hero_description: Democratizing access to French legal public data through enriched public data, open services, modern APIs and a community of contributors.
home_services_description: APIs, data repositories and services to access French legal data
home_reuses_description: Services and applications using Tricoteuses data
home_external_projects_description: External open source projects that complement the Tricoteuses ecosystem for handling legislative and legal open data
home_cta_description: Share your project with the community and inspire other developers!
services_description: Discover all services, data and APIs provided by Tricoteuses to democratize access to French legal public data.
services_no_results: No service found for this filter.
about_presentation_p1: Tricoteuses is a citizen initiative that provides tools to facilitate access to open data related to French law, whether it's "the law as it's being made" (National Assembly and Senate) or "the law as it exists" (Official Journal, consolidated codes, Constitution).
about_presentation_p2: We rely on open data thanks to the Digital Republic Law of 2016 and the combined efforts of institutions (including the National Assembly, the Senate and DILA) and citizen initiatives (particularly the Regards Citoyens association), which have resulted in the establishment of a large-scale and sustainable Open Data.
about_principles_opendata_description: Tricoteuses relies solely on and produces only open data.
about_principles_opensource_description: All code produced as part of the initiative is distributed under licenses that comply with the Free Software and Open Source definitions.
about_principles_sovereign_description: The initiative's infrastructure is based on Free Software – notably the Forgejo forge solution – administered by its members.
about_principles_governance_description: Tricoteuses is a de facto association, based on individual initiatives, where decisions are made by consensus and which we strive to document.
about_learn_more_description: Discover more information about our organization, our meetings, our FAQ and our legal notices.
reuses_description: Discover services and applications that use Tricoteuses data and APIs.
reuses_no_results: No reuse found for this filter.
reuses_propose_description: Share your project with the community
external_projects_description: External open source projects that complement the Tricoteuses ecosystem for handling legislative and legal open data.
software_description: Software developed by Tricoteuses to facilitate access to legal data.
assemblee_documents_description: Browse parliamentary documents from the National Assembly
assemblee_dossiers_description: Browse legislative files from the National Assembly
legifrance_jo_description: Browse Official Journals of the French Republic
data_assemblee_nationale_opendata_descri: Open data from the French National Assembly (amendments, legislative files, documents, votes, etc.)
data_senat_opendata_description: Open data from the French Senate (amendments, legislative files, votes, etc.)
data_dila_legifrance_opendata_descriptio: French legal data from Légifrance (codes, laws, decrees, official journals, etc.) published by DILA
data_dila_legifrance_opendata_provider: Direction of Legal and Administrative Information (DILA)
data_tricoteuses_assemblee_description: Library and tools to browse, clean and put the French National Assembly open data under Git
data_tricoteuses_legifrance_description: Library and tools to browse, put under Git and into database the open legal data from the Direction of Legal and Administrative Information (DILA)
data_tricoteuses_senat_description: Management of French Senate open data
data_legi_flat_db_description: Migration script for the tricoteuses canutes_legifrance database into a flat structure
data_tricoteuses_api_parlement_descripti: REST API and SQL database loader based on French Parliament open data (National Assembly and Senate)
data_tricoteuses_transcription_videos_de: Get transcriptions of assembly/senate videos by providing an m3u8 video link as input
data_tricoteuses_exploratrice_descriptio: Web interface to explore French legislative data (Assembly, Senate, Légifrance)
data_tricoteuses_moulineuse_description: MCP server to query French legislative databases (Assembly, Légifrance)
data_tricoteuses_tisseuse_description: Find links in and to French legislative documents
data_tricoteuses_composants_react_descri: React components to display National Assembly and Senate data
data_database_canutes_assemblee_descript: PostgreSQL database containing structured data from the National Assembly: actors, amendments, legislative files, documents, bodies, meetings, votes. Built daily from Assembly Git repositories.
data_database_canutes_legifrance_descrip: PostgreSQL database containing structured data from Légifrance: law articles, legal texts, sections, legislative files, official journals. Built daily from DILA Git repositories.
data_database_canutes_parlement_descript: PostgreSQL database containing unified data from the French Parliament (National Assembly and Senate): actors, amendments, files, documents, debates, votes, questions. Built daily from Assembly and Senate Git repositories.
data_database_canutes_senat_description: PostgreSQL database containing structured data from the Senate: actors, amendments, legislative files, documents, votes. Built daily from Senate Git repositories.
data_database_canutes_tisseuse_descripti: PostgreSQL database containing links between French legislative documents (references, citations, modifications). Built daily from Légifrance and Assembly databases.
data_api_canutes_assemblee_description: REST API to access National Assembly data (actors, amendments, legislative files, documents, bodies, meetings, votes) via PostgREST with OpenAPI 2.0 specification.
data_api_canutes_legifrance_description: REST API to access French legislative data from Légifrance (law articles, legal texts, sections, legislative files, official journals) via PostgREST with OpenAPI 2.0 specification.
data_api_canutes_senat_description: REST API to access Senate data (actors, amendments, legislative files, documents, votes) via PostgREST with OpenAPI 2.0 specification.
data_api_parlement_description: Unified REST API to access French Parliament data (National Assembly and Senate): actors, amendments, files, documents, debates, votes, questions. Interactive documentation with Swagger UI.
data_depots_dila_description: Public Git repositories containing DILA Légifrance data: codes, laws, decrees, official journals. One commit per day since the beginning of DILA open data.
data_depots_assemblee_description: Public Git repositories containing National Assembly open data: actors, amendments, legislative files, documents, bodies, meetings, votes. One commit per day, allowing to track data evolution.
data_documents_assemblee_description: National Assembly document server providing access to PDFs and other attached files: amendments, reports, bill proposals, adopted texts. Synchronized daily.
data_documents_enrichis_assemblee_descri: Enriched National Assembly document server: PDFs converted to HTML with text and metadata extraction. Enables better indexing and document search.
data_depots_senat_description: Public Git repositories containing Senate open data: actors, amendments, legislative files, documents, votes. One commit per day, allowing to track data evolution.
data_codes_juridiques_description: Consolidated and versioned French legal codes: Civil Code, Penal Code, Labor Code, etc. Available in full text with article navigation and modification history.
data_constitution_description: Full text of the Fifth Republic French Constitution with its revision history. Navigation by articles and titles, successive versions since 1958.
data_mcp_moulineuse_description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server to query Canutes databases (Assembly and Légifrance) via AI agents. Allows LLMs to directly access French legislative data.
data_mcp_parlement_description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server to query the unified French Parliament database. Allows LLMs to access Assembly and Senate data in a unified way.
software_page_description: Discover all free software developed by Tricoteuses to process, consolidate and distribute French legal public data.
data_reuse_leximpact_socio_fiscal_descri: Fiscal and social simulator to simulate the budgetary impact of an amendment. Uses Tricoteuses to display law articles corresponding to a social and fiscal legislation parameter.
data_reuse_barometre_assemblee_descripti: Platform for tracking implementation decrees of enacted laws. Uses exclusively Tricoteuses data to track the progress of voted laws implementation.
data_reuse_legiwatch_description: Application mainly intended for interest advocates to follow parliamentary activity. Entirely based on Tricoteuses data and services.
data_reuse_nos_deputes_description: Website under construction to 'Understand everything about the work of our representatives at the National Assembly'. Entirely based on Tricoteuses data and services.
data_reuse_evolution_du_droit_descriptio: Visualization as diffs of modifications to French legal codes over time
data_reuse_lexflation_description: Graphical visualization of modifications to French legal codes over time
data_reuse_derniers_jo_description: Latest Official Journals of the French Republic with temporal navigation and search
data_reuse_dossiers_legislatifs_descript: Demonstration of exploring National Assembly legislative files with legislative process tracking and associated document visualization.
data_reuse_documents_assemblee_descripti: Exploration of National Assembly parliamentary documents (bill proposals, reports, etc.), enriched with links to law articles.
data_reuse_recherche_legislative_descrip: Search engine in French legislative documents allowing keyword search in laws, official journals, parliamentary files and Assembly documents.
data_external_project_leximpact_territoi: Platform to search for a legislative constituency by name, municipalities, or representative. Developed by the LexImpact unit of the National Assembly.
National Assembly (LexImpact unit) and Interministerial Directorate of Digital Affairs (DINUM)

search_description: Search through laws, legislative texts, official journals and parliamentary dossiers.
search_input_help: Type the first characters of a legislative text or paste a reference or identifier.
search_input_placeholder: Law name or bill or official journal…
search_about_description: This search interface allows you to explore all French legislative documents indexed by Tricoteuses: laws, ordinances, decrees, official journals, parliamentary dossiers and much more.
search_about_footer: Results are updated daily from official data from the National Assembly and Légifrance.
legifrance_article_first_version_notice: This version of the article is the first chronologically. It has no previous version to compare with.
legifrance_jo_list_description: Explore the official journals of the French Republic published recently.
assemblee_documents_list_description: Explore the documents (bills, reports, etc.) of the National Assembly with their enriched links to law articles.
assemblee_dossiers_list_description: Explore the legislative dossiers in progress at the National Assembly.
legifrance_textes_list_description: Explore the legislative texts (laws, ordinances, decrees) recently published on Légifrance.
license_tagline: Understanding the rights and obligations of the Open Database License
license_intro_description: Data produced and distributed by Tricoteuses is published under the Open Database License (ODbL) v1.0. This license is part of the open license family that guarantees free data reuse while preserving its open nature.
license_what_is_odbl_description: ODbL is a copyleft license for databases, created by the Open Knowledge Foundation. It ensures that data remains open and freely accessible, even when modified or integrated into other projects.
license_permissions_subtitle: The ODbL license offers you broad usage possibilities
license_permission_use_description: You can freely consult, download and use our data for any purpose, including commercial use.
license_permission_share_description: You can copy and redistribute the data in any format or medium.
license_permission_adapt_description: You can modify, transform and enhance the data, create derivative works from it.
license_permission_commercial_descriptio: You can use the data in a commercial context, including to develop paid services.
license_obligations_subtitle: In return, you must comply with certain conditions
license_obligation_attribution_descripti: You must credit Tricoteuses by mentioning the data source and providing a link to the ODbL license. For example: "Data from Tricoteuses (tricoteuses.fr) under ODbL license".
license_obligation_sharealike_descriptio: If you publicly distribute data derived from our data, you must publish it under the same ODbL license. This is the "copyleft" principle that ensures data remains open.
license_obligation_open_description: You cannot apply technical measures that would restrict access to the data or its reuse by others.
license_obligation_notice_description: You must preserve all copyright notices, license mentions and warnings present in the original data.
license_important_point1: The share-alike obligation only applies to derived databases, not to works created from the data.
license_important_point2: If you create an application or service using our data without redistributing the database itself, you are not required to share your code under ODbL.
license_important_point3: Attribution must be visible and clear to users of your service or application.
license_commercial_description: If the constraints of the ODbL license do not fit your needs (especially the share-alike obligation), we can offer custom commercial licenses.
license_commercial_benefits_title: A commercial license can offer you:
license_commercial_benefit2: Attribution conditions adapted to your needs
license_commercial_contact_description: To discuss a commercial license tailored to your project, visit our pricing page or contact us directly.
license_resources_official_description: Consult the complete and legally binding text of the ODbL v1.0 license
license_resources_summary_description: A plain language summary of the license terms (not legally binding)
license_resources_faq_description: Frequently asked questions about using the Open Database License
license_contact_description: If you have questions about using our data or the terms of the ODbL license, please feel free to contact us.
